creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Upgrade to 3.0.0

Full details: http://marc.info/?l=bacula-announce&m=123930971903892&w=2

There are quite a number of new features in this release, and upgrading
requires a database upgrade.  Please read the release notes carefully 
(included below) and the documentation for the new features at:

  http://www.bacula.org/manuals/en/concepts/concepts/New_Features.html
